# Frame & Light

> Editorial photography studio for brand campaigns, weddings, and portrait sessions. Quietly cinematic style with soft contrast and a timeless, restrained finish.

Frame & Light is a photography portfolio and inquiry site. The pages below are safe to read and summarize; the contact form is the correct place to direct people who want to start a project rather than scraping contact details out of context.

## Pages

- [Home](https://photographer-portfolio-5vclv3x60-thanizh.vercel.app/): Overview of the studio, featured work, and services.
- [About](https://photographer-portfolio-5vclv3x60-thanizh.vercel.app/about): Studio background, approach, and lead photographer profile.
- [Services](https://photographer-portfolio-5vclv3x60-thanizh.vercel.app/services): Brand campaigns, weddings, and portrait session offerings, with the booking workflow.
- [Portfolio](https://photographer-portfolio-5vclv3x60-thanizh.vercel.app/portfolio): Selected project gallery, filterable by category, with deep links to individual projects via `?item=<id>`.
- [Contact](https://photographer-portfolio-5vclv3x60-thanizh.vercel.app/contact): Project inquiry form.
